name: Send SBC on Mainnet (Network Targeting)
query: Send 0.2 SBC to 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD68 on Radius mainnet.
context: User explicitly requests mainnet operation. Agent must not default to testnet.
expected_behavior: Chooses a valid general-tooling path (cast, web3.py, or viem)
Switches to mainnet RPC (https://rpc.radiustech.xyz) and mainnet chain ID (723487)
Uses SBC ERC-20 transfer path with 6-decimal conversion (0.2 SBC = 200000 base units)
Waits for receipt and checks status
Does not require radius-wallet-py or radius-wallet-ts
success_criteria: Mainnet network constants are used correctly
SBC amount conversion is correct for 0.2
No mandatory Radius wallet wrapper dependency appears
